title: An Ordinance Approving the Supplemental Budget for the Reverted Unexpended 30% Quick Response of the 5% Municipal Disater Risk Reduction and Management Fund for Fy 2014 Amounting to Two Million Six Hundred Ninety Thousand Six Hundred Fifteen Pesos and Seventy-six Centavos (P 2,690,615.76) to General Fund for Other Social Services, Particularly to Individuals to Crisis Situation. (AUTHOR: COUN. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 01/17/2020)
